name: ARAB TUNISIAN DEVELOPMENT – ATD SICAR
description: Tunisian investment company focused on private equity, venture capital and high‑risk capital investments. Operates as a SICAR (investment company in risk capital) within the Arab Tunisian Bank group.

### ARAB TUNISIAN DEVELOPMENT|ATD SICAR
Res. Regency, Bloc C, Bur. 205, Rue du Lac Léman – 1053 Les Berges du Lac, Tunis
**Téléphone** : 71.965.849 | 71.965.693
**Fax** : 71.965.813
**E-mail** : atd@atd.com.tn
* [](https://fr-fr.facebook.com/pages/ATD-SICAR/152202874827432)
## Structure
| Année de création  | 2001  |
| --- | --- |
| Société  | ATD SICAR  |
| Type de société  | Sicar bancaire  |
| Société mère / Groupe  | Arab Tunisian Bank  |
| Effectif  | 13  |
| Capital social  | 2.187,5 MDT  |
| Total des fonds gérés  | 250 MDT  |
| Nombre d’affaires en portefeuille  | 160  |
| Principaux investissements réalisés  | Sotemail, Somosan, Mehari, Promochimica,
Vitalait, Servicom, Citopharma  |
## Politique _d’investissement_
| Champs d’intervention  | Capital risque, développement, transmission,retournement, amorçage  |
| --- | --- |
| Ticket minimum d’investissement  | 500 mDT  |
| Ticket maximum d’investissement7  |  MDT  |
| Durée moyenne d’investissement7  |  ans  |
| Secteurs d’activité  | Tout le territoire tunisien  |

### À propos
L’ATIC fédère et représente les opérateurs Tunisiens du Capital investissement ce qui lui confère une forte légitimité en qualité de porte-parole de la profession auprès des pouvoirs publics.
* [](https://www.facebook.com/Association-Tunisienne-des-Investisseurs-en-Capital-360045507411602/)
* [](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCt0oQoKZdG63Ksac3hUtWtw)

tavily.answer:
Arab Tunisian Development (ATD-SICAR) is a Tunisian investment company. Its official website is https://www.atb.tn/groupe. The company is part of the Arab Tunisian Bank group.
Arab Tunisian Development (ATD) is a Tunisian investment company focused on private equity and venture capital. ATD is part of the ATB Group. ATD operates as a SICAR, an investment company in risk capital.
Arab Tunisian Development (ATD SICAR) is a Tunisian investment company focused on high-risk capital investments. It operates under the SICAR legal framework. The company aims to provide capital gains through investments in emerging companies.
Wellfound is a platform for startup jobs with transparency on salaries and equity. It connects job seekers directly with startup founders. It offers a streamlined application process and diverse job listings.
Arab Tunisian Development (ATD SICAR) is a Tunisian company, and Dealroom is a global data platform founded in 2013 to provide intelligence on startups and high-growth companies. Dealroom raised $16.8M in funding.
